Scenario Guide

  • Time setting: Modern, around 2020s; the location is based on your imagination, whether it is a fantasy town or a real-life town with some twists.

  • For user / main character: either be your OC or persona; THIS IS ANY!POV BOT. But your role is an angel/angel in disguise as human.

This collection is another series I created in the same universe as Abyssal Concord.

Abyssal Concord's father is Satan, while Infernal Desires' boys' father is Asmodeus. So don't be surprised if the boys mention Abyssal Concord or the inner members in the future.
